iti66:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti66:1.3: "There are these three kinds of cleanliness. Which three? Bodily cleanliness, verbal cleanliness, mental cleanliness. These are the three kinds of cleanliness."
iti66:1.4: Clean in body, clean in speech, clean in awareness — fermentation-free — one who is clean, consummate in cleanliness, is said to have abandoned the All.
iti66:1.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
